name: Arkansas Freezer Bag Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced cucumbers and onions in a large bowl.
2. Add sugar, vinegar, salt, and celery salt to the bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Transfer the mixture into freezer bags and seal them tightly.
4. Store the bags in the freezer for later use.
Simple, but one will always have on hand a little something extra for guests - a homemade touch.
